---
title: "Meet the Group"
page-layout: full
sidebar: false
---

## Principal Investigator

::: {.people-grid .people-grid-featured}
::: {.person-card}
![Tao Wen](/files/portraits/tao-wen.jpg){.person-photo}

### Tao Wen

Associate Professor of Earth and Environmental Sciences

Ph.D. Geology | University of Michigan | 2017\
B.S. Environmental Sciences | University of Science and Technology of China | 2011
:::
:::

## Postdoctoral Scholars and Staff

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
![Sitangshu Chatterjee](/files/portraits/Sitangshu_Chatterjee.jpg){.person-photo}

### Sitangshu Chatterjee

Postdoctoral Scholar

Ph.D. Chemistry | Homi Bhabha National Institute\
M.S. Chemistry | Indian Institute of Technology, Kanpur
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Ruta Basijokaite](/files/portraits/Ruta_Basijokaite.jpg){.person-photo}

### Ruta Basijokaite

Postdoctoral Scholar

Ph.D. Earth Sciences | Syracuse University\
M.S. Environmental Engineering | Syracuse University
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Douglas Wood](/files/portraits/Douglas_Wood.jpg){.person-photo}

### Douglas Wood

Field and Computer Technician

M.S. Geology | Syracuse University\
B.A. Geosciences | Hobart and William Smith Colleges
:::
:::

## Graduate Students

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
![Ryan Olivier-Meehan](/files/portraits/Ryan_Olivier-Meehan.JPG){.person-photo}

### Ryan Olivier-Meehan

M.S. Student

B.S. Data Analytics and B.A. Earth Science | Syracuse University
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Nick Su](/files/portraits/Nick_Su.jpg){.person-photo}

### Nick Su

Ph.D. Student

M.S. Civil and Environmental Engineering | Carnegie Mellon University\
B.E. Civil and Environmental Engineering | Israel Institute of Technology
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Khi Atchinson](/files/portraits/Khi_Atchinson.JPG){.person-photo}

### Khi Atchinson

Ph.D. Student

B.S. Geology | SUNY Cortland
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Zanchenling Wang](/files/portraits/Zanchenling_Wang.jpg){.person-photo}

### Zanchenling Wang

Ph.D. Student

B.S. Physics | Peking University
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Liyang Qin](/files/portraits/Liyang_Qin.jpg){.person-photo}

### Liyang Qin

Ph.D. Student

M.S. Earth Sciences | University of Minnesota-Twin Cities\
B.S. Physical Geography and Earth and Ocean Sciences | University of Victoria
:::
:::

## Undergraduate Students

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
![Aamna Khan](/files/portraits/Aamna_Khan.jpeg){.person-photo}

### Aamna Khan

B.S. 2026

Aamna is a triple major in Environmental Geoscience; History; and Environment, Sustainability, and Policy.
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Cameron O'Neill Light](/files/portraits/Cameron_Light.jpeg){.person-photo}

### Cameron O'Neill Light

B.S. 2026

Cameron majors in Applied Data Analytics with a minor in Earth Science.
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Brooklyn Toller](/files/portraits/Brooklyn_Toller.jpeg){.person-photo}

### Brooklyn Toller

B.E. 2027

Brooklyn is a double major in Environmental Engineering and Environment, Sustainability, and Policy.
:::
:::

## Lab Visitors

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
![Harsita Mav](/files/portraits/Harsita_Mav.jpeg){.person-photo}

### Harsita Mav

M.S. in Computer Science

Harsita is an M.S. student in Computer Science at Syracuse University.
:::

::: {.person-card .person-card-open}
![Open visitor opportunity](/assets/artworks/Avatar_Default.png){.person-photo}

### Interested Visitors

Visitors can email Prof. Tao Wen to learn about opportunities in the WEN Research Group.
:::
:::

## Alumni

::: {.people-grid}
::: {.person-card}
![Ryan Olivier-Meehan](/files/portraits/Ryan_Olivier-Meehan.JPG){.person-photo}

### Ryan Olivier-Meehan

B.S. Data Analytics and B.A. Earth Science | 2025

Undergraduate alumnus; now an M.S. student in the WEN Research Group.
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Sam Nesheim](/files/portraits/Sam_Nesheim.jpg){.person-photo}

### Sam Nesheim

M.S. 2023

Water Sciences Research Technician at Michigan State University.
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Beibei E](/files/portraits/Beibei_E.jpg){.person-photo}

### Beibei E

M.S. 2023

Ph.D. student in Oceanography at Texas A&M University.
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Sam Walcott](/files/portraits/Sam_Walcott.jpeg){.person-photo}

### Sam Walcott

B.S. 2023

Associate Analyst at Eversource Energy.
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Jenna Klein](/files/portraits/Jenna_Klein.jpg){.person-photo}

### Jenna Klein

B.S. 2023

Environmental Scientist at AECOM.
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Linda Arterburn](/files/portraits/Linda_Arterburn.png){.person-photo}

### Linda Arterburn

B.S. 2023

Ph.D. student in Atmospheric Chemistry at Georgia Institute of Technology.
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Rohit Patil](/files/portraits/Rohit_Patil.jpg){.person-photo}

### Rohit Patil

M.S. 2021

Software Development Engineer at Amazon.
:::

::: {.person-card}
![Favour Epuna](/files/portraits/Favour_Epuna.jpg){.person-photo}

### Favour Epuna

M.S. 2022

Staff Scientist at Aspect Consulting LLC.
:::
:::
